'''Mors Odrion''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] diplomat who worked for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Alliance Diplomatic Corps|Diplomatic Corps]]. Along with the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Rekara]], he investigated the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sedri/Legends|Sedri]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], where he was captured by the [[Sedrian]] [[bishop of war]], [[Karak]].

==Biography==
Mors Odrian and his [[retainer]], the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Rekara]], served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They recruited and worked to secure supplies for the growing Rebellion. During this work, Odrion and Rekara began to hear rumors of a new [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Aquatic Garrison|garrison]] that had been established on a strange [[Waterworld/Legends|waterworld]]. Investigating further, Odrion decided to get more directly involved in the war effort; along with Rekara, he set course for the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sedri/Legends|Sedri]].<ref name="BGS" />

Arriving at Sedri despite the warnings coming from the [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]], Odrion and Rekara found a planet glowing with seemingly golden [[Ocean/Legends|seas]]. Hiding their vessel in a rocky cove, Odrion and Rekara searched for the source of the golden light. The source faded before they could find it, and the pair were captured by a [[Karak's renegades|group]] of [[Sedrian]]s, the world's native [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="BGS" />

The leader of the renegades, [[Karak]], used a piece of [[Golden Sun coral|coral]] to steal information from Odrion's mind, including information on the Rebellion, the Empire, and Odrion's mission to Sedri. Odrion was kept under constant guard during his incarceration. Rekara managed to escape her incarceration, but Karak had plans for Odrion, intending to use him as a bargaining chip when dealing with the Empire. In exchange for Imperial assistance in securing the sun caves and the Golden Sun, Karak promised to hand Odrion over to Imperial [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Aban]] once the power was his. Odrion was taken by Karak to [[Fitsay]] during the [[Battle of Fitsay|attack]] on the [[City/Legends|city]]. Karak was eventually defeated by a team of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Agent/Legends|agents]] sent to rescue Odrion. With the Imperial threat lessened and Karak arrested, Odrion agreed to remain on Sedri as a representative of the Alliance.<ref name="BGS" />

==Personality and traits==
Mors Odrion was young and impetuous, and possessed a daring and adventurous spirit.<ref name="BGS" />
